calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-054 bipartite layout substrate-readiness diagnostic
items.note: Structural-only env-level diagnostic validating the SD-054 bipartite-layout extension landed 2026-05-11. 4 arms (ARM_0 legacy, ARM_1 bipartite horizontal radius=1, ARM_2 bipartite horizontal radius=0, ARM_3 bipartite vertical radius=1) x 3 seeds; random policy, no agent training. Local PASS verified 2026-05-11 (C0/C1/C2/C3/C4 all PASS; ARM_1 structural divergence 0.807, 1.27x uplift over ARM_0 baseline 0.633). Cross-plan: arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md GAP-B resume_condition; full-pipeline V3-EXQ-543b/c rerun deferred until V3-EXQ-548 PASS confirms substrate readiness.
